spec_match.rationale: Interactive card builder with controls for global `corner-shape`, per-corner overrides, `border-radius`, `superellipse(n)` exponent, and colours — the full authoring surface plus generated CSS output.

interactive.rationale: Inputs, selects, range, and color pickers wired to a live preview, with copyable CSS generated as the user customises. Working authoring tool.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises `Interactive card builder with full control over global or per-corner corner-shape, border-radius, superellipse(n) exponent, card width, and colours. Generates ready-to-copy CSS`. Page is exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: 6 edge-term hits — covers some failure modes but doesn't show what generated CSS looks like with conflicting longhand+shorthand (`corner-shape` + `corner-top-left-shape` together) or when the user picks an invalid superellipse exponent.

references.rationale: Page has no `see also` chromestatus link. Sections list shows only `see also` and the link isn't in there — invariant #3 violation.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles use raw hex (`#fafaf7`, `#e8e6df`) bypassing design-system variables. Invariant #5 only permits the defined `--bg-*` / `--text-*` palette.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: `see also` is missing `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5357329815699456`. Invariant #3. Add it plus the css-borders-4 corner-shaping spec.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Inline styles use `#fafaf7`, `#e8e6df` — map to `--bg-ivory` / `--bg-stone` from `public/styles.css`. Invariant #5.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate longhand-vs-shorthand cascade
openQuestions.detail: When both `corner-shape: round` and `corner-top-left-shape: scoop` are set, the longhand wins. Surface that interaction in the generated CSS panel (or warn when the builder produces overlapping rules) so authors see the cascade.

openQuestions.title: Add a feature-detect probe
openQuestions.detail: No probe in this page. Add `CSS.supports('corner-shape', 'squircle')` with a banner so users know whether their browser will render the preview correctly.

summary: Full-surface authoring tool — best per-corner / per-property coverage in the feature — but ships missing the chromestatus link, the feature probe, and slipping raw hex into the design system.
